title: Liberal construction
doc_html:
§130.867. Liberal construction

            This Subpart, being necessary for the welfare of the state, the city, and their residents, shall be liberally construed to effect the purposes thereof.

            Acts 2015, No. 420, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
doc_text:
§130.867.  Liberal construction
This Subpart, being necessary for the welfare of the state, the city, and their residents,
shall be liberally construed to effect the purposes thereof.
Acts 2015, No. 420, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
